sqlReaderQuery.value:
select t1.* from (
select ap.id
,ap.reportId
,ap.behaviorTrackingId
,ap.categoryName
,ap.trackingMethod
,ap.behaviorName
,ap.definition
,ap.latestPlanId
,ap.latestPlan
,ap.dateInitiated
,ap.planMean
,ap.planLowestPoint
,ap.planHighestPoint
,ap.lastDataPointId
,ap.lastDataResult
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap  
inner join SavedReports sr on (ap.Reportid=sr.id   )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (sr.childprofileid=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_SavedBehaviorReportDetails t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (
select   ap.id
,ap.userId
,ap.childProfileId
,ap.name
,ap.startDate
,ap.endDate
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.childprofileid=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_SavedBehaviorReports t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (
select   ap.Id
,ap.ReportId
,ap.LessonId
,ap.GoalText
,ap.NoOfObjectivesMastered
,ap.NoOfObjectives
,ap.NoOfTargetsMastered
,ap.NoOfTargets
,ap.IEP
,ap.CCSS
,ap.LessonStatus
,ap.LessonUserStatus
,ap.ObjectiveId
,ap.ObjectiveText
,ap.ObjectiveSeq
,ap.ObjectiveStatus
,ap.ObjectiveUserStatus
,ap.TargetId
,ap.TargetName
,ap.TargetStatus
,ap.DataPointsInDateRange
,ap.LastDataPointPercentage
,ap.DataType
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.LessonNotes
,ap.MeanPerformance
,ap.StartDate
,ap.DateMastered
,ap.MinNumOfTrials
,ap.MinPercentForTrial
,ap.ConsecutiveSuccess
,ap.PlanId
,ap.PlanName
,ap.PlanStartDate
,ap.PlanEndDate
,ap.LessonUserStatusText
,ap.DataNoteCount
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join SavedReports sr on (ap.Reportid=sr.id   )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (sr.childprofileid=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_SavedReportData t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (
select  ap.Id
,ap.ReportId
,ap.LessonId
,ap.LessonCategory
,ap.LessonName
,ap.LessonMastered
,ap.LessonMasteredDate
,ap.MostRecentResult
,ap.LessonDescription
,ap.LessonInitiateDate
,ap.DateInitiated
,ap.StepsMastered
,ap.CurrentStep
,ap.CurrentStepMeanPerformance
,ap.MasteryCriteriaNote
,ap.ResponseMasteredNote
,ap.CurrentStatusNote
,ap.categoryIcon
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.CurrentTargetDesc
,ap.CurrentTargetId
 from dbo.SavedReportDetails ap 
inner join dbo.SavedReports sr on ( ap.Reportid=sr.id    )  
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (sr.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_SavedReportDetails t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select ap.Id
,ap.MemberId
,ap.ChildProfileId
,ap.ReportName
,ap.StartDate
,ap.EndDate
,ap.LessonFilter
,ap.LessonList
,ap.showgraph
,ap.showdetails
,ap.shownotes
,ap.showcc
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.Email
,ap.SendToAddress
,ap.EmailReportName
,ap.ShowDataNotes 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.childprofileid=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
--and ap.Ismigrated=0
)t1
left join Temp_KareoInsuranceCompanies t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select ap.ScheduledReportId
,ap.AmountOfRecords
,ap.RelativeFilePath
,ap.NumberOfDownloads 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.ScheduledReports sr on (ap.scheduledreportid=sr.id  )
inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =sr.memberId    )
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_ScheduledReportAdditionalParameters t2 on t1.ScheduledReportId = t2.ScheduledReportId
WHERE t2.ScheduledReportId IS NULL
select ScheduledReportId from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  ap.id
,ap.reportType
,ap.reportParameters
,ap.requestedAt
,ap.startedProcessingAt
,ap.finishedProcessingAt
,ap.message
,ap.exportSubscriptionId
,ap.MemberId
,ap.AccountInfoId
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.memberId    )
--inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.memberId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_ScheduledReports t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select ap.sessionScheduleId
,ap.lessonId
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join  dbo.SessionSchedule  sse on (ap.sessionscheduleid=sse.id   )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (sse.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_SessionScheduleLesson t2 on t1.sessionScheduleId = t2.sessionScheduleId AND t1.lessonId = t2.lessonId
WHERE t2.sessionScheduleId IS NULL AND t2.lessonId IS NULL
select sessionScheduleId,lessonId from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  ap.id
,ap.[subject]
,ap.[start]
,ap.[end]
,ap.recurrenceRule
,ap.recurrenceParentId
,ap.annotations
,ap.hollowCaregiverId
,ap.childProfileId
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.memberID 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_SessionSchedule t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  ap.Id
,ap.InvoiceNumber
,ap.DateReported
,ap.AccountInfoId
,ap.InvoiceMonth
,ap.Clients
,ap.FileLocation
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=ap.accountInfoId  )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_SetssInvoices t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  ap.Id
,ap.FileCabinetFolderId
,ap.UserType
,ap.UserId
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateCreated 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join  dbo.FileCabinetFolders  fc  on (ap.FilecabinetFolderid=fc.id  )
inner join  dbo.FileCabinet f on (fc.Filecabinetid=f.id   )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (f.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_SharedFolderAccess t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  ap.MemberId
,ap.MedicaidId
,ap.RequestJson
,ap.SequenceId
,ap.UpdatedTimesCount
,ap.StateModelJson
,ap.SandataStatusUuid
,ap.IsInProcess 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.memberId    )
--inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.memberId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_StaffMemberSandataInfo t2 on t1.MemberId = t2.MemberId AND t1.MedicaidId = t2.MedicaidId
WHERE t2.MemberId IS NULL AND t2.MedicaidId IS NULL
select MemberId,MedicaidId from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (
select   ap.Id
,ap.StaffMemberId
,ap.StaffSignatureId
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
--inner join hcstaffmember m on (m.id = ap.Staffmemberid )
inner join tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.Staffmemberid   )
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_StaffSignatures t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select ap.ID
,ap.SubscriptionID
,ap.ProductID
,ap.PaymentType
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateCreated 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap	
inner join Subscription s on (ap.SubscriptionId=s.ID)
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (s.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_SubscriptionProduct t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select ap.id
,ap.PromotionID
,ap.SubscriptionID
,ap.PromoStartDate
,ap.PromoEndDate
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateCreated 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 	
inner join Subscription s on (ap.SubscriptionId=s.ID)
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (s.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_SubscriptionPromotion t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select s.ID
      ,s.hollowSubscriberID
      ,s.SubscriptionStartDate
      ,s.NextPaymentDate
      ,s.PaidThroughDate
      ,s.SubscriptionStatusID
      ,s.hollowTotalProfiles

      ,s.SubscriptionTypeID
      ,s.PaymentMethodID
      ,s.SupportTypeID
      ,s.AutomatedBilling
      ,s.termsacceptance
      ,s.CustomizedCurriculum
      ,s.DateCreated
      ,s.DateLastModified
      ,s.DateDeleted
      ,s.SubscriptionSubTypeID
      ,s.LastNotificationSent
      ,s.LastPaymentDate
      ,s.LastBillingAmount
      ,s.CommonStandards
      ,s.BehaviorTracking
      ,s.maxAccountProfiles

      ,s.accountInfoID
      ,s.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged

      ,s.MasteryCriteria
      ,s.inclusion

      ,s.EmployeeBenefitProvider
      ,s.ExtendSessionTimeout
      ,s.OrganizationTypeId
      ,s.PreTestTarget
      ,s.coachingTypeId
      ,s.trainingProgram
      ,s.maxAccountMembers
      ,s.ShowRbt
      ,s.ShowClinical
      ,s.ShowScheduling
      ,s.ShowBilling
      ,s.AcademicCurriculum
      ,s.VbMappLicenses
      ,s.ShowVbMapp
      ,s.BillingOptionId
      ,s.DisableCKEditor
      ,s.ShowANSIClaims
      ,s.ShowParentVerification
      ,s.ShowMessaging
      ,s.AssessmentOnly
      ,s.ShowNycInvoicing
      ,s.ShowSetss
      ,s.ShowGraphs
      ,s.ShowTherawe
      ,s.ShowEVV

      ,s.ShowExceedAuth

from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} 
		 s inner join accountinfo a on (s.accountinfoid=a.id)
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  s.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_Subscription t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select 
ap.Id
,ap.TeachingStepId
,ap.TargetId
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
 INNER JOIN dbo.TeachingStep ts ON ap.TeachingStepId = ts.id
INNER JOIN dbo.LearningProcessAttributes lp ON ts.LearningProcessAttributesId = lp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.CurrentCurriculum cc ON lp.id = cc.LearningProcessAttributesId
INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON cc.childprofileid = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_SystemTeachingSteps t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select a.* from (
select --ap.*
ap.id
,ap.targetId
,ap.teachingStepId
,ap.definingStep
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
inner join dbo.TeachingStep ts on (ap.teachingStepId=ts.id  )
 inner join dbo.LearningProcessAttributes lp on (ts.LearningProcessAttributesId=lp.id)
 inner join dbo.CurrentCurriculum cc   on (ts.LearningProcessAttributesid=cc.id)
 inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (cc.childprofileid=p.id )
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
 
) a
left join Temp_TargetTeachingSteps b on a.Id = b.ID
where b.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (
select --top 100 ap.*,lpa.*
-- ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.[name]
,ap.pos
,ap.LearningProcessAttributesId
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.correctPromptId
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join LearningProcessAttributes LPA on ( ap.LearningProcessAttributesid=lpa.id  )
inner join AccountInfo A on A.LearningProcessAttributesId = LPA.ID
--where ap.LearningProcessAttributesid=5980852
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
--and ap.Ismigrated=0
union 
select --top 100 ap.*,lpa.*
-- ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.[name]
,ap.pos
,ap.LearningProcessAttributesId
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.correctPromptId
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join  LearningProcessAttributes LPA on ( ap.LearningProcessAttributesid=lpa.id  )
Inner join CurrentCurriculum CC ON LPA.ID = CC.LearningProcessAttributesId
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (CC.childprofileid=p.id ) 
inner join AccountInfo A on p.AccountInfoID = A.ID
--where ap.LearningProcessAttributesid=5980852
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
--and ap.Ismigrated=0
union 
select --top 100 ap.*,lpa.*
-- ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.[name]
,ap.pos
,ap.LearningProcessAttributesId
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.correctPromptId
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join  LearningProcessAttributes LPA on ( ap.LearningProcessAttributesid=lpa.id  )Inner Join dbo.BehaviorTracking b on (b.LearningProcessAttributesId=LPA.ID )
Inner Join ChildProfile C ON C.ID = B.ChildProfileID
inner join AccountInfo A on C.AccountInfoID = A.ID
--where ap.LearningProcessAttributesid=5980852
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
--and ap.Ismigrated=0
)t1
left join Temp_TeachingStep t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID

WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (
select ap.id
,ap.memberId
,ap.testId
,ap.score
,ap.reviewSteps
,ap.dateTaken
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateMastered
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DeleteDate
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.DateLastModified 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.memberId    )
--inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.memberId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_TestResultHistory t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID

WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}
